## Sprint Record

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is bounded.
- [ ] Tests or checks were run, or skipped checks are justified.
- [ ] Relevant docs were updated.
- [ ] No telemetry or network behavior was added without an ADR.
- [ ] No real user documents or local paths were committed.
- [ ] File import/export changes include hostile-input tests.
- [ ] I am requesting squash merge.
